productDisplayName: Salomon Men Black Synapse Mid Sports Shoes
description: Style Notesalomon comes up with its first ever natural motion hiking shoe - the Synapse Mid. This is not specifically a running shoe but performs excellently on various surfaces because of its Dynamic Traction technology. The aggressive outsole is designed from a high abrasion rubber compound, thanks to which the grip on these kicks is brilliant - an essential feature if you're hiking on rough terrain or scrambling up a rock. The Dynamic Ride and OS Muschle gives superior cushioning in this shoe and the OS Tendon running along the circumference of the outsole adds rebound to your stride (runners, note!) In summary, these shoes' USP is that its lightweight, with excellent support and speed-enhancing features (more so if you're descending a slope during a run) Need we mention that this sharp looking shoe definitely goes easy on the eyes?Product DetailsMid top hiking shoe with a lightweight synthetic upper and strategically located mesh inlaysToggle style quicklacing system with a lace pocket in the padded tongue to tuck in the endsEVA footbed Contagrip outsole with multidirectional Dynamic Traction lugsMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshRemove dirt with a soft wet brush and clean waterDo not machine wash or dry under the sunDry in room temperatureFor specific care instructions on each part of this shoe, refer booklet that comes with this shoe
